# terrible_community_general_nomad_job (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `state` (String) Deploy or remove job.

### Optional

- `content` (String) Content of Nomad job. Either this or `name` must be specified.
- `content_format` (String) Type of content of Nomad job.
- `force_start` (Boolean) Force job to started.
- `name` (String) Name of job for delete, stop and start job without source. Name of job for delete, stop and start job without source. Either this or `content` must be specified.
